title: Alone Mod [Humanities Unraveled]
description: "Show those who pretend to be gods who the real Apex Predator is."
body:
**ANNOUNCEMENT!!!!**

_Due to the sheer scale of this Modpack project exceeding both my current technical knowledge and my computer's hardware capabilities, I must announce that development on this Modpack will be discontinued indefinitely._

However, for anyone interested in the concept of this Modpack, I grant full permission for you to use the name, the concept, and all related ideas to continue its development and build upon it as you see fit.

</details>





"This modpack is not an original creation. It's simply a modpack inspired by the '[Ultimate Survival 10: Gods and Guns](https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLIBuow5EUWpBkZ3dHutUTLU342DvnTBfh&si=-iFxB-YyOjfd2Uax)' series from the [GWPunch](https://www.youtube.com/@GWPunch) channel.

![GW](https://yt3.googleusercontent.com/ytc/AIdro_k0AOLsREudl6AyGQxzwbzK4mMSsflbtGP7XQff6jKXzhA=s160-c-k-c0x00ffffff-no-rj)

The contents of the modpack may not match the original exactly due to copyright issues with some mods, and because it was created by just one person who has no knowledge of data handling, Java, or coding."



[Alpha and Infringing Version](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1LYXHa_n6BT7Gzw0VpRVrED_WdcX5eBWx?usp=sharing)
